description: Wire the shipped `evals/assertions.py` structural assertion engine into the live eval run path. After each prompt output is produced and before LLM judge grading, run configured assertions such as `contains`, `regex`, length bounds, `json_valid`, and `json_has_key`; record deterministic pass/fail evidence in the run artifact/report; define how failed assertions affect verdict/score/judge execution. Keep the existing offline CLI usable. Origin: deferred from `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-eval-framework-hardening.md` live-path integration.
title: Live run-path assertion gating
